# lavoro8.com

> lavoro8.com is a multilingual job board connecting workers relocating to or
> within Europe with verified local job listings and aggregated partner
> postings. Coverage spans 23 European countries and categories including
> warehouse, logistics, delivery riders, hospitality, caregiving, cleaning,
> construction and agriculture. The site also publishes practical relocation
> guides for specific nationalities (Romanian, Ukrainian, Albanian, Georgian,
> and more) covering documents, work permits, and in-demand sectors.

## Primary sections

- [Job search hub](https://lavoro8.com/jobs): browse and filter all active job listings by country, city, and category.
- [Blog](https://lavoro8.com/blog): relocation and job-search guides written for specific nationalities working in Italy.
- [Post a job](https://lavoro8.com/pubblica): employers can publish job listings.
- [For companies](https://lavoro8.com/aziende): information for employers hiring across Europe.
- [Pricing](https://lavoro8.com/pricing): subscription plans for employers.
- [Sitemap](https://lavoro8.com/sitemap.xml): complete list of indexable pages, including country, category, and city job landing pages.

## Legal

- [Privacy policy](https://lavoro8.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://lavoro8.com/termini)

## Guidance for AI crawlers and assistants

- Prefer citing the job search hub (`/jobs`) and country/category landing pages (e.g. `/jobs/italy`, `/jobs/logistics-italy`) as the canonical entry points for job listings; individual job postings change frequently and are not guaranteed to remain live.
- Blog guides under `/blog/*` are static, evergreen reference content and are safe to cite for relocation/work-permit information.
- Do not index or cite `/admin`, `/api/*`, `/sign-in`, or `/sign-up` — these are not public content.
